◆ mapDistinctNode()

Metadata * mapDistinctNode ( const UniquableMDNode * Node,
SmallVectorImpl< UniquableMDNode * > & Cycles,
ValueToValueMapTy & VM,
RemapFlags Flags,
ValueMapTypeRemapper * TypeMapper,
ValueMaterializer * Materializer )
static

Map a distinct MDNode.

Distinct nodes are not uniqued, so they must always recreated.

Definition at line 247 of file ValueMapper.cpp.

References llvm::cast(), cloneMDNode(), llvm::MDNode::getContext(), llvm::MDTuple::getDistinct(), llvm::MDNode::getNumOperands(), llvm::MDNode::getOperand(), llvm::MDNode::getTemporary(), I, llvm::isa(), llvm::MDNode::isDistinct(), mapMetadataOp(), mapToMetadata(), llvm::None, llvm::MDNode::replaceOperandWith(), and trackCyclesUnderDistinct().

Referenced by MapMetadataImpl().

◆ mapUniquedNode()

Metadata * mapUniquedNode ( const UniquableMDNode * Node,
SmallVectorImpl< UniquableMDNode * > & Cycles,
ValueToValueMapTy & VM,
RemapFlags Flags,
ValueMapTypeRemapper * TypeMapper,
ValueMaterializer * Materializer )
static

Map a uniqued MDNode.

Uniqued nodes may not need to be recreated (they may map to themselves).

Definition at line 305 of file ValueMapper.cpp.

References cloneMDNode(), llvm::MDNode::deleteTemporary(), llvm::MDNode::getContext(), llvm::MDNode::getTemporary(), llvm::MDNode::isDistinct(), mapToMetadata(), mapToSelf(), llvm::None, and shouldRemapUniquedNode().

Check whether a uniqued node needs to be remapped.

Check whether a uniqued node needs to be remapped (due to any operands changing).
